name: May (Guilty Gear)
description:
The first mate of the Jellyfish Pirates from the Guilty Gear series.

(Intro message is kinda lame but I couldn't figure out what to do with it.)

Couldn't find any May chatbots on here, which is pretty lame. May is one of my favorite fighting game characters and she's been one of my mains since I played XRD.
